category_sources: source_facts.description says WordGrinder is a Unicode-aware word processor that runs in a terminal; official README describes a Unicode-aware console word processor.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage and official GitHub README use the display name WordGrinder.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README says README.wg contains the manual; repository README provides installation and usage notes.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides the official repository, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe a terminal/console word processor focused on Unicode-aware writing.
